title: Avatar (Pandora) Resource Pack
description: This Project is a Minecraft Pandora Resource Pack From the movies "Avatar, Avatar: The Way of Water, Avatar: Fire and Ash"
body:
My YouTube Chanel:
UCLZA96yWueaCe6S5QdyFa3g


The Project 🗂️:

This is The Avatar Texture Pack it changes the textures from minecraft to Avatar style. 
it also adds some new glowing effects to plants.
If you like Avatar This Texture Pack is made for you!

what we have 🎮:

-All tools are reworked(exept netherite)
-deepslate and ores have a new design.
-2 wood secies have a new design.

How to use it ⚙️:

1. download it
2. put it in your modpack folder
3. start it and go to    settings
4. click on resource packs and add the Avatar-Resource pack.

But i would recomend watch an youtube tutorial because every modding-platform is different.

Support/Discord/contact 🤝:

Im still working on this project, and it would be awesome if you can support me.
if there a bugs       (wrong color/invisible etc.)
or ideas
(new designs for blocks/rework ideas)
 join my Discord and tell them.
Ever detail matters.
that would help a lot!

If you need help Join my discord:
https://discord.gg/xJA6ayYXaX


Thanks!

made by:
Dr_Navi

Minecraft ingame name: Dr_Navi_YT
